title: Aether Plus 2
description: 💀 Conquer Bosses  • 🐦Flying Pets  • ☁️ Sky Is The Limit • ✨ Acquire Gear • 💎 Shaders| ✅ Play Now With Friends
body: ![aether plus 2 - banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08746e34aabeb962994ecc35e2116bbf1c1e1bca.webp) # ✅ Features - ☁️ **The OG Aether** > Dive into the legendary Aether, a dimension floating high above the clouds. Discover a world of wonder and beauty, waiting to be explored. Encounter unique creatures and unveil its ancient secrets. - ✨ **Majestic Optimized Shaders** > Transform your Minecraft experience with breathtaking visuals. Enjoy stunning lighting, realistic reflections, and immersive volumetric fog. Play smoothly with performance-optimized shaders that make your world shine. - 💀 **Conquer Bosses** > Face off against challenging and epic bosses lurking within the Aether's depths. Each victory promises incredible loot and powerful rewards. Prove your might and become a true champion. - 🌍 **Explore Heaven-like Dimension** > Ascend into a dimension of unparalleled beauty, resembling a mythical heaven. Float among ethereal islands, vibrant flora, and cascading waterfalls. Every corner holds new discoveries in this celestial realm. - 🗺️ **Not Lost With Minimap** > Navigate the expansive Aether with ease thanks to an integrated minimap. Mark important locations like your home base or hidden dungeons. Never lose your way in this boundless new world. - 🎒 **Sophisticated Backpacks** > Expand your carrying capacity with versatile and upgradable backpacks. Store hundreds of items and keep your inventory organized. Enjoy features like magnet collection and more to enhance your adventures. - 🔮 **Quality Of Life Features** > Experience a smoother and more enjoyable gameplay with numerous enhancements. From improved crafting to intuitive inventory management, every detail is designed for your convenience. Focus on adventure, not frustration. - 🌐 **Full Multiplayer Support** > Share the wonder of the Aether with your friends! This modpack is fully optimized for multiplayer fun. Embark on epic quests, conquer bosses, and build together in this heavenly dimension. # ![Aether Bosses Split View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d4f45f1255ac661155eb4fbffcf002a50245100.webp) ![Backpacks - Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89aa23d677eb0cb2341543ce1f7a28f21395409a.webp) # 📊 Additional Info - 🔍Check Out **[Gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/aether-plus-2/gallery)** For More Images - 💬Join Our **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/uSzRGWqgn3)** - ⚡Fully Optimized With Shader Support (3Gb Ram Min.) - 💡Recommended Server Hosting -> **[Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=6876)** - 📦Included projects are in version tabs; click the version. # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
